tags.name: Fellenrütistrasse
tags.note: Legally (by local signs) bus=no, but this road is used by EAB route 4 therefore psv=designated.

As of September 2022 this road appears to be private access, sign at Kantonsstrasse junction says "Ausgenommen Berechtigte" = "Except for those with permission"..  Therefore removed "motorcar=destination" and "motorcycle=destination" tags.

tags.name: Zingel-Obermatt
tags.note: Path barely visible on digital terrain model. Self-made guidepost with Zingel Alp at the start of the trail in the valley.
Precise route uncertain; GPX trace needed

tags.fixme: Route in forest uncertain, survey needed

tags.note: path barely visible on digital terrain model. Self-made guidepost with Zingel Alp at the start of the trail in the valley

This parallel track was built for the use of construction traffic for the new dam and settling basins project.  The project was due to be completed in October 2025, so this track may be removed again sometime after that date.
